desc.en: Lahore Metro Orange Line is Pakistan’s first urban rapid transit system and a key project of China-Pakistan Economic Corridor, which officially opened in October 2020. The line stretches 27.1 kilometers with 26 stations, including 24 elevated stations and 2 underground stations. Adopting Chinese standards and equipment, it runs fully automatic driverless air-conditioned trains with a maximum speed of 80 km/h, connecting eastern and western Lahore and greatly cutting commuting time.
